elections.note: CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('FENU'-coded row), Napa County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 19,147, Last Report stamp 'Jun 5 11:03 p.m.' (First Report 'Jun 5 8:00 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20120608222655 (2012-06-08 22:26:55 UTC). FROZEN: the identical Ballots Cast figure 19,147 recurs across 2 captures, 2012-06-08 22:26:55 UTC through 2012-06-17 19:21:15 UTC, holding to the end of the CDX capture window (no later capture available to show a jump). NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 29,305 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2012-primary/pdf/03-voter-reg-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 19,147/29,305 = 65.34%. vs_epollbook=pre, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2018, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2012-06-05 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary.

PLATEAU = final-of-night report. County 'Unofficial Election Night Results' detail header reads 'Last Updated: November 6, 2012 11:29 PM (Last of the Night)'. Registration & Turnout block: Vote by Mail Turnout 26,846 + Election Day Turnout 5,869 = Total 32,715 (45.07% of 72,592 reg). Napa released ALL pre-processed VBM (26,846) in the 8:01 PM first tranche (fixed all night) and trickled in election-day precinct votes (0 -> 2,050 at 10:16 PM -> 5,869 at 11:29 PM); 32,715 is the last election-night report before the multi-day canvass. NOT the 8:01 PM first tranche (26,846 = 46.6%, which the v2 baseline wrongly used). Certified final 57,672 ballots (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County: 6,251 precinct + 51,421 VBM). Pct = 32,715/57,672 = 56.73%, consistent with SF ~57% calibration. Pre-epollbook (adopted 2018); ASV never. Snapshot 20121208223758 used.

CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('FENU'-coded row), Napa County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 17,431, Last Report stamp 'Jun 3 11:43 p.m.' (First Report 'Jun 3 7:59 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20140606205510 (2014-06-06 20:55:10 UTC). FROZEN: the identical Ballots Cast figure 17,431 recurs across 3 captures, 2014-06-06 20:55:10 UTC through 2014-06-11 17:04:51 UTC, holding to the end of the CDX capture window (no later capture available to show a jump). NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 28,179 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2014-primary/pdf/03-voter-particpiation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 17,431/28,179 = 61.86%. vs_epollbook=pre, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2018, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2014-06-03 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary.

BEST-AVAILABLE (10:30 PM report; the EXACT final-of-night report is permanently unrecoverable from Wayback). Napa's 11/4/2014 election-night reports ran 8:01 PM (20141104-2001) -> 10:30 PM (20141104-2230) -> 10:42 PM final (20141104-2242). RE-VERIFIED: the 10:42 PM final-of-night report's content frames (_dtl/_hdr/_idx) were NEVER crawled by Wayback — CDX returns [] for 20141104-2242_dtl.htm at ANY status code (with or without the trailing '?' the frameset uses), and a raw id_ fetch returns HTTP 000; only the bare 20141104-2242.htm frameset was archived (capture 20141108092935), which renders empty. The latest FULLY-archived election-night report is the 10:30 PM 20141104-2230 snapshot: header 'Last Updated: November 4, 2014 10:30 PM', Registration & Turnout = Vote by Mail 17,341 (24.60%, fixed since the 8:01 PM first tranche) + Election Day 945 (1.34%) = Total 18,286 (25.94% of 70,491 registered — archived report reads 70,491, not the 70,493 in the prior note). KEY: at 10:30 PM every statewide contest still showed '0/164' precincts reporting and only 945 election-day ballots were in, so in-person precinct counting had barely begun and largely occurred during the multi-day canvass; the 10:42 PM plateau 12 minutes later is therefore only modestly above 18,286 (NOT near the eventual ~2,397 certified precinct ballots — the earlier ~19,650 estimate was too high). Reported value 18,286 is a documented floor and close approximation of the true plateau = 47.17%. NOT the 8:01 PM first tranche (17,341 = 44.7%, the v2 value). Certified final 38,766 (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County: 2,397 precinct + 36,369 VBM). Pre-epollbook (adopted 2018); ASV never. Snapshot 20150916061050 used (2230_dtl). Stays SECONDARY: exact final-of-night report lost, and no morning-after semi-final press release survives (Napa's press-release archive starts 2022; county news room not cleanly archived for Nov 2014). CORRECTION (2026-07-10): landed value replaced with the CA SoS county-reporting-status page's Final Election Night Unofficial (FENU) figure, 19,515 ballots, Last Report stamp 'Nov 4 11:14 p.m.' (32-44 min after the county's last archived 10:30 PM web report and its unarchived 10:42 PM 'final'). The SoS FENU state is doubly bracket-confirmed: Napa's row reads 167/167 precincts (100.0%) / 19,515 / 27.7% at capture 20141105141649 and is byte-identical (frozen) two days later at 20141107083801, before jumping to 35,800 (CCU) at Nov 14. The county's own 10:30 PM page showed statewide precinct tallying essentially not yet started (0/164), i.e. the SoS captured a later, fuller moment of the SAME continuous election-night count (Napa kept feeding the state after it stopped updating its public web page); the 18,286 figure above undercounts the plateau by the ~1,229 ballots that posted between 10:30/10:42 PM and 11:14 PM. New pct = 19,515/38,766 = 50.34%. source_url_night moved to the SoS status-page capture (Wayback 20141105141649 of vote.sos.ca.gov/returns/status/); confidence -> primary (official SoS aggregation page, doubly bracketed). The 18,286 floor evidence is retained above as history. HUMAN VERIFICATION (maintainer, 2026-07-10): the 18,286 county 10:30 PM artifact read was hand-confirmed as correctly transcribed; this confirmation predates and is independent of the SoS FENU replacement, and both statements stand (the artifact read was accurate; 19,515 is nonetheless the fuller election-night plateau now landed).

PLATEAU = final-of-night report. County 'Election Summary Report' PDF 20161108-2306.pdf (filename ts = Nov 8 2016, 23:06 = 11:06 PM) is the LAST election-night report (next archived file is the Nov 16 canvass update 20161116-1635.pdf, then the Dec 5 certified Final). Header: 'Precincts Reported: 167 of 167 (100.00%)', 'Ballots Cast: 34,108'. Pre-VCA single-card ballot, so Ballots Cast = voters. NOT the 8:01 PM first tranche (which Wayback never archived for 2016). Certified final 63,255 ballots (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County: Napa Total Voters 63,255, 82.33% of 76,833 reg). Pct = 34,108/63,255 = 53.92%. Pre-epollbook; ASV never. PDF downloaded from snapshot 20161218225536 (id_ raw) and parsed with pdftotext.

PLATEAU = 'LAST UNOFFICIAL ELECTION NIGHT REPORT' (napacounty.gov DocumentCenter View/10436, the last of First/Last pair published election night). 'Precincts Reported: 170 of 170 (100.00%)', 'Registered Voters: 21,774 of 78,135 (27.87%)', and per-contest 'Times Cast 21,774'. ('Ballots Cast: 43,611' is ballot CARDS ~2/voter in the VCA 2-card ballot, NOT the comparable metric.) First report of the night was 21,732 voters, so the count barely moved election night and 21,774 is the plateau before the multi-day canvass. FIRST VCA / e-pollbook vote-center election for Napa (post): same-day vote-center and same-day-dropped mail ballots were processed in the canvass, NOT election night, which is why the election-night share fell from ~54-57% (pre-VCA) to ~38%. Certified final 57,132 voters (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County). Pct = 21,774/57,132 = 38.11%. ASV never. Live PDF parsed with pdftotext.

PLATEAU = 'Last Unofficial Election Night Report' timestamped 10:46 PM (napacounty.gov DocumentCenter View/26985; the night's reports ran First 8:01 PM -> Second 9:50 PM -> Last 10:46 PM, then the Nov 14 4:19 PM '1st Post Election Night' canvass report View/26995). Header: 'Precincts Reported: 200 of 200 (100.00%)', 'Voters Cast: 21,943 of 83,471 (26.29%)', breakdown Election Day 1,553 + Vote by Mail 20,390 = 21,943. NOT the 8:01 PM first tranche (20,390 = 40.1%, the v2 value). Post-VCA / e-pollbook (adopted 2018). Certified final 50,788 voters (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County). Pct = 21,943/50,788 = 43.21%. ASV never. Live PDF parsed with pdftotext.

PLATEAU = 'Last Unofficial Election Night Report' timestamped 12:35 AM Nov 6 (napacounty.gov DocumentCenter View/34231; the night's reports ran First 8:01 PM 22,504 -> Second 9:49 PM -> Third 11:45 PM -> Last 12:35 AM 26,160, monotonic, then the multi-day canvass). Header: 'Precincts Reported: 204 of 204 (100.00%)', 'Voters Cast: 26,160 of 85,150 (30.72%)', per-contest 'Times Cast 26,160'. NOT the 8:01 PM first tranche (22,504 = 33.8%, the v2 value). Post-VCA / e-pollbook (adopted 2018). Certified final 66,634 voters (CA SoS Voter Participation Statistics by County). Pct = 26,160/66,634 = 39.26%. ASV never. (2020 deliberately excluded as a COVID universal-VBM outlier.) Live PDF parsed with pdftotext.
